:PROPERTIES:
:corpus-source:   Rector
:corpus-id:       R01
:corpus-severity: Important
:corpus-url:      https://doi.org/10.1007/978-3-540-30202-5_5
:corpus-citation: Rector, Drummond, Horridge, Wroe, Stevens, Wang, Wroe (2004), "OWL Pizzas: Practical Experience of Teaching OWL-DL", EKAW 2004, sec. 4 (Trivial Satisfaction of Universal Restrictions).
:corpus-expects:  planned/rector-only-without-some
:corpus-rationale: Universal-only restriction without an accompanying
 existential is trivially satisfied on individuals that have no
 fillers; authors typically intend "has at least one and only".
:END:
#+title: Rector R01 -- universal restriction without accompanying existential

* corpus-r01
:PROPERTIES:
:ID: corpus-r01
:ELOT-context-type: ontology
:ELOT-context-localname: corpus-r01
:ELOT-default-prefix: ex:
:header-args:omn: :tangle no
:END:
** Prefixes
:PROPERTIES:
:prefixdefs: yes
:END:
| prefix | uri                                   |
|--------+---------------------------------------|
| owl:   | http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#        |
| rdfs:  | http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema# |
| ex:    | http://example.org/corpus/r01/        |

** corpus-r01 ontology (ex:corpus-r01 ex:corpus-r01/0.0)
:PROPERTIES:
:resourcedefs: yes
:END:
 - owl:versionInfo :: 0.0

** Classes
:PROPERTIES:
:resourcedefs: yes
:END:
*** Vegetarian pizza (ex:VegetarianPizza)
 - rdfs:label :: "Vegetarian pizza"@en
 - SubClassOf :: ex:hasTopping only ex:VegetableTopping
*** Vegetable topping (ex:VegetableTopping)
 - rdfs:label :: "Vegetable topping"@en

** Object properties
:PROPERTIES:
:resourcedefs: yes
:END:
*** has topping (ex:hasTopping)
 - rdfs:label :: "has topping"@en
